sentences.arabic: رَأَى حَسَنٌ لُعْبَةً جَمِيلَةً فِي المَتْجَرِ.
sentences.translation: Hasan je vidio lijepu igračku u prodavnici.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan saw a beautiful toy in the store.

sentences.translation: Zamolio je majku da mu je kupi.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his mother to buy it for him.

sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Cijena joj je sada visoka.
sentences.translationEn: His mother said: Its price is high now.

sentences.translation: Hasan je čekao dok cijena nije pala.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan waited until the price went down.
